?. Admin dashboard flow

Admin dashboard sidebar ???? section-wise ??? ??? ???? ?? section-?? ??? ???? section-?? ???? mix ?? ??? ????? ????? ???? route structure clean ???? ??????

DashboardSales summary, orders, notification count, quick links.
ProductsAdd/edit product, color-wise image, category-wise size, stock, SEO/meta.
OrdersStatus update, payment status, invoice print, delivery slot, customer details.
CategoriesShop category, size fields, custom fields, sorting.
BannersHomepage hero/banner image, title, button link.
SettingsStore info, Dubai shipping areas, payment visibility, Stripe/COD, UI theme.
CouponsDiscount code, validity, active/inactive.
ReviewsApprove/hide customer review.
UsersCustomer/admin role, ban/unban, order history.

?. Important routes

RoutePurposeClient note
/en, /arHomepageHero, categories, featured products, trust section.
/en/shopProduct listingFilter/search/sort with dynamic colors.
/en/product/[id]Product detailsColor/size variant, image switch, add to cart.
/en/cartCartQuantity and checkout action.
/en/checkoutCheckoutGuest checkout, Dubai address, shipping area, delivery slot, COD/Stripe.
/en/track-orderOrder trackingCustomer can track order without logging in.
/en/admin/dashboardAdmin dashboardOnly admin can access.
